ab: ni yaba’ ma’an raro:o’ hi kalih.
ya:o hayza’ ’aehae’ minatini’ kamamanra:an siya Sin ta:inin, siya ’isahini lampez o ’aehae’ tinal’oemaeh.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫ta:in，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is ta:in, he is 11 years old.

ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: yako ki minatini’ kamamannra:an minowa’ ma:tol.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: ya:o minowa’ lalangoy, ray minaSangay, yami ’aehae’ taew’an ma’onhael rima’ lalangoy.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: ya:o minowa’ Sekla’ ka ’ima SaSo’ kapa’onhaelan yami kayzaeh ma’onhael ma:tol ki lalangoy.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
